title: They're Coming
body:
# They're Coming!
so survive as long as possible. The mod acts as a custom difficulty, and removes the other ones.
Mobs are stronger, faster, smarter, more aggressive and more equipement.

The game will become progressivly more difficulty as you play in your world.
There is a blood moon and fog, both trigger a huge mob wave the player.
Monsters that spawn with high attributes have red glowing eyes.
